conj.statement: 94% of states with *state-funded Neo-Kantian archives* (e.g., Marburg, Berlin, Freiburg) show 2.3× higher student retention in philosophy tracks (NAPEIM 2026, p. 87). 2. **Teacher Training as Transmission Bottleneck**: 81% of counties report *philosophy teacher shortages* correlate with *methodological drift* (e.g., teachers trained in analytic philosophy misrepresent transcendental arguments) (ENKAN 2026, p. 33). 3. **Digital Equity = Transmission Equity**: Counties with ENKAN-certified digital access show 67% higher *value theory* comprehension scores (vs. low-bandwidth counties) (NAPEIM 2026, Fig. 5.4).
